summary: Iteration 17: Sanctions.io API Key Modal UX Testing Complete. All new features working correctly: Gear icon opens modal with backdrop blur, password-type API key input, localStorage persistence, Live/Demo mode badges, toast notifications on API error with demo fallback. 19/19 backend tests passed, all UI flows verified.
passed_tests: Screening page shows 'Demo Mode' yellow badge next to title
Gear/Settings icon visible in header area next to 'New Screening' button
Clicking gear icon opens API Key modal with backdrop blur
Modal shows: Demo Mode status, password input, Save & Activate button, sanctions.io link
POST /api/screenings/run without api_key returns demo mode results
POST /api/screenings/run with fake api_key falls back to demo with api_error field
New Screening form opens with Sanctions, PEP, Adverse Media checked by default
Running a screening shows result card with provider badge (Demo Data)
Result card shows match type badges (PEP), match score %, list source, country
Toast notification appears on API error: 'API Error — falling back to demo mode'
Live badge (green) shows when API key is in localStorage
Screening history table shows check badges (SAN, PEP, AM)
critical_code_review_comments: API key modal properly implements localStorage persistence with rudrik_sanctions_api_key key
Backend correctly accepts api_key in request body and falls back to demo mode on API error
api_error field properly returned when live API call fails
Toast notification system working correctly for API errors
Mode indicator correctly switches between Live (green) and Demo Mode (yellow)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_sanctions_io.py (added 3 new tests for api_key in body feature)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sanctions.io API integration with gear icon modal fully tested. New features: (1) Gear icon opens modal instead of inline banner, (2) API key saved to localStorage + backend, (3) api_key passed in request body to /api/screenings/run, (4) api_error field returned on live API failure, (5) Toast notification on API error. All data-testid attributes working: screening-settings-btn, api-key-modal, api-key-input, save-api-key-btn, screening-mode-indicator, screening-provider-badge, screening-toast.

mocked_apis.Sanctions.io: MOCKED (demo mode - no real API key configured)
